name: Petlicious & More Cat Toy Interactive Rolly Polly Tumbler with Feather Toy & Treat Despensing Toy Feather Toy (Color May Vary)
description: This Feather Whirl Cat Toy features motion and feathers activate a cat's natural instinct to chase and pounce, encouraging healthy activity while simultaneously keeping them entertained. It will become one of your cat's favorite toys! Unpredictable play pattern attract cat's attention and motivate cats hunt and capture instinct. Non-toxic and safe. Patented.
